data.body:
AC amendment: Script-not-found must FAIL, not SKIP — do NOT use the 'echo SKIP: ...; exit 0' pattern from other integration tests. When figma-url-parse.sh or figma-auth.sh are not found, tests must exit 1 (FAIL), not skip. This is the RED contract — absence of the implementation script IS the expected failure mode.

AC amendment: Add cleanup trap. Include a _CLEANUP_DIRS array and a _cleanup() EXIT trap (pattern from test-add-parameter-integration.sh) that also removes any figma lock files created during test execution. Establish this in the boilerplate before any test functions.
